title: USA vs. Australia: World Cup on the Big Screen | AMNH

original_text:
USA vs. Australia: World Cup on the Big Screen
Watch the USA vs. Australia FIFA World Cup 2026™ match at the Museum on the big screens in LeFrak Theater, Cullman Hall of the Universe, and the Global Sports Pavilion in the Futter Gallery.
FIFA World Cup 2026™ watch parties are part of the Museum’s World Cup, World Cultures summer series, which celebrates the community and science of sport through exhibitions, experiences, and special programming.
Watch parties are free with any Museum admission.
